goal: Rewrite install.sh for .cnogo/ layout with manifest, version tracking, and lifecycle operations

tasks.name: Rewrite install.sh core to copy from .cnogo/ layout
microSteps: Read current install.sh to understand full copy logic
Update script header: add --update, --uninstall, --force, --from flags to usage
Change Python script source paths: scripts/*.py → .cnogo/scripts/*.py
Change hook source paths: scripts/hook-* → .cnogo/hooks/hook-*
Change template source paths: docs/templates/ → .cnogo/templates/
Change memory package source: scripts/memory/ → .cnogo/scripts/memory/
Add context package copy: .cnogo/scripts/context/ (with phases/ subdir)
Copy _bootstrap.py to target .cnogo/scripts/
Update memory init Python code to use sys.path.insert(0, '.cnogo')
Replace .gitignore append logic with block markers (# >>> cnogo / # <<< cnogo)
Verify install.sh runs without errors on a temp directory

tdd.reason: Shell script rewrite — verified by dry-run install to temp directory

tasks.action: Rewrite install.sh to read source files from .cnogo/ layout instead of scripts/ and docs/templates/. Key changes: (1) Python scripts from .cnogo/scripts/*.py, (2) hooks from .cnogo/hooks/hook-*, (3) templates from .cnogo/templates/, (4) memory/ and context/ packages from .cnogo/scripts/, (5) _bootstrap.py copied to target, (6) memory init uses sys.path.insert(0, '.cnogo'), (7) .gitignore uses block markers (# >>> cnogo / # <<< cnogo) instead of append-if-missing.

tasks.name: Add manifest.json and version.json generation to install.sh
microSteps: Add generate_manifest() function that walks all copied files
Compute sha256 hash for each file using shasum -a 256
Assign ownership category per file (managed/seeded/merged/scaffold based on path patterns)
Write .cnogo/manifest.json with schemaVersion, files array (path, category, sha256), generatedAt
Add generate_version() function that writes .cnogo/version.json
version.json includes: version (from git tag or 'dev'), sourceCommit (git rev-parse HEAD), source (repo URL or local path), installedAt timestamp
Call both functions after all files are copied
Verify manifest.json is valid JSON with correct file count

tdd.reason: Shell script additions — verified by JSON parse and content checks

tasks.action: Add two functions to install.sh: generate_manifest() writes .cnogo/manifest.json with sha256 hashes and ownership categories for every file touched by the installer. generate_version() writes .cnogo/version.json with version, sourceCommit, source URL, and timestamp. Category assignment uses path patterns: .cnogo/scripts/** and .cnogo/hooks/** → managed, CLAUDE.md and PROJECT.md → seeded, settings.json and .gitignore → merged, docs/planning/work/** → scaffold. Both called after all file copies complete.

tasks.name: Add --update and --uninstall lifecycle operations
microSteps: Add ACTION variable parsing: default=install, --update, --uninstall, --force (uninstall+install)
Add --from <git-url|local-path> flag for source resolution

Implement do_update(): read manifest, fetch new source, hash-compare managed files, backup user-modified to .cnogo/backup/<timestamp>/, overwrite managed, remove files deleted in new version, add new files, re-merge settings.json and .gitignore, regenerate manifest

Implement do_uninstall(): read manifest, remove all managed files, clean settings.json (remove entries with _cnogo marker), clean .gitignore (remove cnogo block), leave seeded files, remove .cnogo/ directory
Add settings_merge() helper: add/replace/remove hook entries with _cnogo:true marker
Add gitignore_merge() helper: add/replace/remove content between # >>> cnogo and # <<< cnogo markers
Route to correct operation based on ACTION variable
Verify --uninstall removes managed files and leaves seeded files

tdd.reason: Shell script lifecycle — verified by install/uninstall round-trip on temp directory

tasks.action: Add lifecycle operations to install.sh. Parse --update, --uninstall, --force flags into ACTION variable. do_update() reads .cnogo/manifest.json, compares sha256 hashes, backs up user-modified managed files to .cnogo/backup/<timestamp>/, overwrites managed files, handles additions/deletions. do_uninstall() reads manifest, removes managed files, cleans settings.json (removes _cnogo-marked hooks), cleans .gitignore (removes # >>> cnogo block), leaves seeded files (CLAUDE.md, PROJECT.md), removes .cnogo/. settings_merge() and gitignore_merge() are shared helpers used by all three operations.

commitMessage: feat(cnogo-packaging): rewrite install.sh with manifest, versioning, and lifecycle ops
